base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_potion_red_blue — a pickup_item (health_pickup) from 1986 legend of zelda. Potion (red+blue variants) — blue restores 1 HP, red restores all HP. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Potion (red+blue variants) — blue restores 1 HP, red restores all HP; auto-used when HP reaches 0
